source_pr.title: failpoint: update failpoint
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: AilinKid <314806019@qq.com>

<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
Related failpoint PR: https://github.com/pingcap/failpoint/pull/58

Problem Summary: 

Fix go failpoint data race in TiDB test case.
1: when `*CustomParallelSuiteFlag = true` is set, the tests in different `Suite` will run parallelly.
2: when a test arrived `Enable()`, when another arrived `Eval()` will cause data race in failpoint.

For more detail: 
1: see https://internal.pingcap.net/idc-jenkins/blue/organizations/jenkins/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/detail/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/38125/pipeline/
2: Also fixes https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/17625
### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed: update go.mod

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- No code

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->
- failpoint: update failpoint which will cause data race before

symptoms: PR body: fix go failpoint data race in TiDB test case; references pingcap/failpoint#58.
failure_signature: PR body: fix go failpoint data race in TiDB test case; references pingcap/failpoint#58.
root_cause_explanation: TiDB tests can run different check suites in parallel (via CustomParallelSuiteFlag), but the global failpoint state in the pingcap/failpoint library used to have a data race between Enable() and Eval(). This PR stabilizes the test environment by bumping the failpoint dependency to a version that fixes the Enable/Eval data race under parallel execution.
fix_pattern: Bump the pingcap/failpoint dependency to a version that fixes the global failpoint Enable/Eval data race under parallel test suites.

evidence: evidence: PR body: fix go failpoint data race in TiDB test case; references pingcap/failpoint#58.
evidence: diff updates failpoint dependency in go.mod/go.sum to remove race under parallel suites.
